articles.title: All the key moments from the 2026 British Grand Prix
articles.summary: Charles Leclerc enjoyed a long-awaited return to the top step of the podium at the British Grand Prix during an action-packed weekend both on and off track.

articles.title: 5 betting lessons learnt after Leclerc wins at Silverstone
articles.summary: Charles Leclerc won his first Grand Prix of the season as Drivers’ Championship leader Kimi Antonelli suffered another mechanical issue.

articles.title: What the teams said – Race day in Great Britain
articles.summary: The drivers and teams report back on all the action from Silverstone for the 2026 British Grand Prix.

articles.title: Rare Sainz penalty for Safety Car infringement confirmed
articles.summary: Carlos Sainz has been handed a post-race penalty following the British Grand Prix after a Safety Car infringement.

articles.title: 'A lot to improve' – McLaren drivers assess their British GP
articles.summary: Reigning World Champion Lando Norris believes McLaren "have a lot to improve" after a difficult British Grand Prix, which yielded fourth place.

articles.title: Verstappen details Red Bull issue behind his British GP crash
articles.summary: After crashing out at Silverstone, Max Verstappen has opened up on the recurring issue that forced him out of the British Grand Prix.

articles.title: British GP problems 'tough to swallow' for Antonelli
articles.summary: Kimi Antonelli admits failing to score any points in the British Grand Prix was "tough to swallow", as the Mercedes driver was hit by late car problems when on course to challenge for victory.

articles.title: Verdict in Hamilton post-race investigation announced
articles.summary: Following his podium at the British Grand Prix, Lewis Hamilton faced the stewards post-race after being investigated for a yellow flag infringement.

articles.title: Gladysz inherits Silverstone F3 Feature Race win
articles.summary: ART Grand Prix rookie Maciej Gladysz finished fourth on the road but inherited victory after multiple penalties elsewhere.

articles.title: Russell 'brutally honest' on his British GP performance
articles.summary: George Russell admits "I'm not going to fight for a championship if the performances continue like that", despite claiming his first podium in the British Grand Prix.
